svg.text: 2-up card layout matching admin · paginated when more than 2 KPIs · reuses HeroStatsCard, new BrandKpiCarousel wrapper

g.text: Each card uses the existing HeroStatsCard. Pages of 2 are wrapped in a new BrandKpiCarousel.
Source: Attendance.where(student_id IN children) AND date >= now()-30d → pct present
Source: StudentBilling.where(due_date < today, status IN ['Pending','Partial']) sum(amount_due)
Source: GradeRecap.avg(final_score) for student_id, current Semester
Reuse: existing field; just add the 24h delta sub-aggregate
• props: cards: List<HeroStatsCard>, perPage = 2, autoplay = false
• dot strip: active = 20×6 rounded, inactive = 6 circle, color brand-azure deep
HeroStatsCard · sudah ada — dipakai apa adanya
• icon, label, value, caption?, trend?, accentColor, onTap
• cache 60s per (parent_id, school_id), invalidasi pada switch school
• Tap kartu → navigate ke screen tab terkait (Kehadiran / Keuangan / Rapor / Pengumuman)
• Swipe horizontal di area kartu → ganti halaman; dot mengikuti
• Switch anak (chip aktif) → semua KPI re-fetch untuk student_id baru
• Empty state per kartu (data null/0) → tetap render, value "—" dengan caption "belum ada data"
• Skeleton state saat loading: 2 kartu shimmer (skeleton variant HeroStatsCard)
· Card body white · 16 radius · 0.75 slate-200 border · soft shadow · 14 padding
